title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at L&T Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
